arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola heaps praise on Kevin De Bruyne after his man-of-the-match display against Nottingham Forest finally ended Man City's winless run - but reveals fresh double injury blow
arts.sum: AADAM PATEL AT THE ETIHAD STADIUM: De Bruyne scored and assisted as City beat Nottingham Forest 3-0 for their first win in 39 days.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola gives verdict on Jack Grealish's new Man City role
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola spoke about Jack Grealish's performance against Nottingham Forest in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Manchester City and Arsenal win as leaders Liverpool held at Newcastle
arts.sum: Liverpool’s draw allowed Arsenal to cut the gap at the top of the table to seven points.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola worried by fresh injuries as Man City end winless streak
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola was downbeat about new injuries picked up by two of his players against Nottingham Forest

arts.ttl: Furious Nottingham Forest fans all agree one player looked ‘out of his depth’ vs Manchester City
Man City 3-0 Nottingham Forest: Player ratings as Guardiola's side finally end winless run
arts.sum: Player ratings from Man City 3-0 Nottingham Forest in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Man City 3-0 Nottingham Forest PLAYER RATINGS: Which star caused problems all evening? Who delivered a much-improved display? And how did Kevin De Bruyne fare on his return to the starting XI?
arts.sum: AADAM PATEL AT THE ETIHAD STADIUM: Manchester City finally returned to winning ways with a 3-0 victory against Nottingham Forest on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Man City player ratings vs Nottingham Forest as two stars dazzle with 8/10
arts.sum: Manchester City player ratings as goals from Bernardo Silva, Kevin De Bruyne and Jeremy Doku gave the Blues a 3-0 win.

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne stars as Manchester City end winless run in style
arts.sum: Goals from Bernardo Silva, a rejuvenated Kevin De Bruyne and Jeremy Doku saw the champions finally get back to winning ways.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest ratings vs Man City, Moreno gets respectable 7/10 but forgettable outing for a 3/10
arts.sum: A tough night at the office...
